title: Munich, Bavaria — Cost of Living, Housing & Relocation Guide [2026]
description: Complete guide to Munich, Bavaria: cost of living, home prices, neighborhoods, remote work readiness, and relocation tips.
content:
Overview

Munich is a city in Bavaria with a population of 1,512,000. Bavaria’s capital, blending Alpine charm with economic powerhouse status, home to BMW, world-class museums, and Oktoberfest.

Last updated: July 13, 2026
